heroDesc: Not campaigns that spike. Acquisition systems, retention loops, and growth frameworks that compound month after month.

process.title: Discovery
process.body: Full audit of existing channels, funnel stages, and data. Map where revenue is coming from and where it's leaking.

process.title: Strategy
process.body: Build a growth model for your specific stage and market. Define channel priorities, testing cadence, and success metrics.

process.title: Build
process.body: Launch experiments, set up tracking infrastructure, and establish the content and distribution systems.

process.title: Launch
process.body: Execute campaigns, run A/B tests, and start generating data to learn from.

process.title: Scale
process.body: Double down on what's working. Kill what's not. Build repeatable systems that run without you.

goodFit.item: Founders or CMOs with product-market fit who want systematic growth
Companies with €500K+ revenue ready to scale
Businesses willing to invest 90+ days in a compounding strategy
Teams that want to understand their growth model, not just outsource it

badFit.item: Businesses wanting a one-time campaign with no measurement
Pre-revenue startups without a validated offer
Teams that won't give access to data and analytics

ctaHeadline: Ready to build a growth system that compounds?
ctaSubtext: Let's map out your growth model and identify the highest-leverage moves for your stage.
